violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food * was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Containers of potato salad and coleslaw in the display cooler were dated sell by 1/20/26 and 1/22/26. These need to be discarded.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor in the deli walk in cooler needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Cracked floor tile in front of the deli reach in freezer.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
